data.name: Airdrop
data.description: Catchphrase Riot spotlight pack derived from a currently spreading narrative lane. Live cue words: airdrop, phrase, crypto, how. Live examples: PEPE, penis chan. Build the mechanic around the lane, not around any single active token name. Mechanic: A short line or phrase that people can reuse immediately in replies, screenshots, and copy-paste posts.. Audience: Fast chat-native traders who buy the first joke they can repeat in one line.. Visual lane: Poster-style logo with one loud prop and sticker energy.. Activation: Pin the catchphrase, keep the image readable, and push one reply template around airdrop.. Signal anchors: airdrop, phrase, crypto, how.
